title: licania octandra subsp. pallida
intro: Licania octandra subsp. pallida, a lesser-known variant of the Licania octandra tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Licania octandra subsp. pallida include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its potential to act as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Licania octandra subsp. pallida include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
